title: Senior Instructional Designer at Coursera India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Coursera India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Coursera India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Instructional Designer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Coursera India International Enterprises:
Coursera India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
